attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
WSSF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,
WFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,
WSSF.SR_NUMBER,
WSSF.ORDER_NUMBER,
WSSF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER,
WSSF.ORDER_SA_NUMBER,
WSSF.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
COALESCE (RP_HYB.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, WSSF.PRODUCT_FAMILY),
WSSF.SITE_THEATER,
WSSF.SITE_COUNTRY,
WSSF.SRVC_LINE,
WSSF.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT,
WSSGC.CONTRACT ,
WSOC.SRVC_CATEGORY,
WCT.THEATER ,
WSSF.ENT_PRODUCT_ID  ENT_PRODUCT_ID, 
WSSF.LOOKUP_THEATER  LOOKUP_THEATER,
WSSF.CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP   CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP,
WSSF.QUANTITY_SHIPPED QUANTITY_SHIPPED,
WSSF.COUNTRY_CODE COUNTRY_CODE,
WSSF.CUSTOMER    CUSTOMER,
WSSF.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST,
COALESCE(WSSF.ALLOCATED_COST,0)  ALLOCATED_COST,
WSSF.DEPT_COST,
WSSF.DEPRECIATION_COST,
WSSF.REPAIR_COST,
WSSF.DUTY_VAT_COST,
WSSF.TPL_COST,
WSSF.TPM_COST,
WSSF.OEM_COST,
WSSF.FAILURE_CODE,
WSSF.WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT,
RP_ENT.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
RP_COV.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
WSSF.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH,
0 AS DEPR_ECO_CREDIT  ,    
0 AS DEPR_MERAKI_CREDIT    ,     
0 AS DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT  , 
0 AS DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT  ,           
0 AS TPL_ECO_CREDIT  ,
0 AS TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT  ,
0 AS REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT,
0 AS DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT,
0 AS OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT,
'N' AS RMA_CREDIT_FLG
/*Addition of New Umpire Credit amounts as part of JUN FY22 Release*/
,0 AS DEPR_UMPIRE_CREDIT   
,0 AS REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT 
,0 AS DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT  
,0 AS TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_SUMMARY WSSF
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID WFM
ON WFM.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = WSSF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_COUNTRY_THEATER WCT
ON WCT.COUNTRY_CODE = WSSF.COUNTRY_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SR_ATTRIBUTE ESA
ON ESA.SR_NUMBER = WSSF.SR_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP_ENT
ON RP_ENT.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ESA.ENT_PRODUCT_ID
AND RP_ENT.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'   /* ADDED AS PART OF M&A JUN10 Q4FY18*/
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP_COV
ON RP_COV.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ESA.COVERED_PRODUCT_ID
AND RP_COV.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'   /* ADDED AS PART OF M&A JUN10 Q4FY18*/
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP_HYB
ON RP_HYB.BK_PRODUCT_ID = COALESCE (ESA.ENT_PRODUCT_ID,ESA.COVERED_PRODUCT_ID)
AND RP_HYB.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'   /* ADDED AS PART OF M&A JUN10 Q4FY18*/
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_SUB_GRP_CONTRACT WSSGC 
ON WSSGC.SRVC_SUB_GRP = WSSF.SRVC_LINE
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_OFFERING_CATEGORY WSOC 
ON WSOC.SRVC_OFFERING = WSSGC.CONTRACT
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE	FROM  $$STGDB.WI_EDW_SSC_COGS  
WHERE	FISCAL_MONTH_ID  IN (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID);

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WSACF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,WSACF.SR_NUMBER
,WSACF.ORDER_NUMBER
,WSACF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
,WSACF.PRODUCT_FAMILY
,WSACF.ORDER_SA_NUMBER
,WSACF.SITE_THEATER
,WSACF.SITE_COUNTRY
,WSACF.CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP
,WSACF.QUANTITY_SHIPPED
,WSACF.ORDER_SA_SERVICE_LINE
,COALESCE(ESA.ENT_PRODUCT_ID,ESA.COVERED_PRODUCT_ID)
,ESA.CUST_COUNTRY
,WSACF.MARKET_SEGMENT
,WSACF.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
,COALESCE(WSACF.DEPT_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.DEPRECIATION_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.REPAIR_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.DUTY_VAT_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.TPL_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.TPM_COST,0)
,COALESCE(WSACF.OEM_COST,0)
,(COALESCE(WSACF.DEPT_COST,0) + COALESCE(WSACF.DEPRECIATION_COST,0) + COALESCE(WSACF.REPAIR_COST,0) + 
COALESCE(WSACF.DUTY_VAT_COST,0) + COALESCE(WSACF.TPL_COST,0) + COALESCE(WSACF.TPM_COST,0) + COALESCE(WSACF.OEM_COST,0))
,WSACF.CUSTOMER
,WSACF.LOOKUP_THEATER
,WSACF.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH
,WSACF.WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT
,WSACF.FAILURE_CODE
 FROM (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ACTIVITY_COST
WHERE	FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)) WSACF
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SR_ATTRIBUTE ESA
ON ESA.SR_NUMBER = WSACF.SR_NUMBER
AND WSACF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_SUMMARY
WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID  IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID);

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.QUARTER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.FISCAL_MONTH_ID, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.FISCAL_MONTH, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SR_NUMBER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.ORDER_NUMBER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.ORDER_SA_NUMBER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.HW_FAMILY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.HYBRID_PRODUCT_FAMILY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SITE_THEATER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SITE_COUNTRY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SRVC_LINE, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SRVC_OFFERING, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SRVC_CATEGORY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.C3_CUST_THEATER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.ENT_PRODUCT_ID, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.LOOKUP_THEATER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.QUANTITY_SHIPPED, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.COUNTRY_CODE, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.CUSTOMER, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.ALLOCATED_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPT_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPRECIATION_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.REPAIR_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DUTY_VAT_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.TPL_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.TPM_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.OEM_COST, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.FAILURE_CODE, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.COVERED_PRODUCT_FAMILY, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPR_ECO_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPR_MERAKI_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DUTY_VAT_ECO_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DUTY_VAT_MERAKI_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.TPL_ECO_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.TPL_MERAKI_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.REPAIR_ECO_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPT_MERAKI_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.OEM_MERAKI_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.RMA_CREDIT_FLG, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DEPR_UMPIRE_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.REPAIR_UMPIRE_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.DUTY_VAT_UMPIRE_CREDIT, WI_EDW_SSC_COGS.TPL_UMPIRE_CREDIT 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_EDW_SSC_COGS
WHERE 1=2
